Every matched shot · video 1 · commit 4bc2542

Predicted vs. ground truth, frame by frame

All 53 ground-truth-matched shots from Badminton_video_example.mp4, each showing the exact frame the deployed pipeline used to compute that shot's zone (real TrackNetV3 shuttle landing point when found, shot-detection frame otherwise) — homography grid, player feet, racket, and shuttle marker as actually rendered.

4 frames flagged as pre-rally footage, not gameplay — rally 1's first 4 shots (frames 180–294) landed on the pre-match coin-toss/ceremony, not the point itself. This is a known, previously-documented issue (rally 1's 6-second intro-skip is too short for this video — see DEPLOYMENT_LOG.md, 2026-07-03), not something new from this round of changes. Marked below rather than silently mixed in with genuine zone-mapping misses.
11.3% exact · 64.2% exact-or-adjacent
All 53 source PNGs saved at output/gt_comparison_frames/Badminton_video_example/ (filenames encode rally/seq/predicted/ground-truth/result), alongside records.json with the full per-shot data.
